title: GSL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Expert / Specialist Posts
short_info: Goa Shipyard Limited (GSL) Expert / Specialist Notification 2026 has been released under Advt No. 04/2026 on the official website Goa Shipyard Limited. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the GSL Expert / Specialist Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 65 years as on 30-04-2026. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor of Engineering (B.E.)/ Bachelor of Technology (B. Tech.) in Civil Engineering or any discipline
qualification.details: Expert / Specialist - Civil: Bachelor of Engineering (B.E.)/ Bachelor of Technology (B. Tech.) in Civil Engineering from a recognized university/institute. Expert / Specialist – Business Development & Projects: Bachelor of Engineering (B.E.)/ Bachelor of Technology (B. Tech.) in any discipline from a recognized university/institute.

salary_details.details: For Ex-Govt. / PSU Employees: Last drawn Basic + DA rate as per CDA/IDA on basic at the time of separation. For Other than Ex-Govt. / PSU employees: Decided by the Selection Committee.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for GSL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.goashipyard.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 08-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the GSL Expert / Specialist posts?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the GSL Expert / Specialist posts is 08-06-2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Expert / Specialist posts at Goa Shipyard Limited?
faq.answer: Goa Shipyard Limited (GSL) has announced a total of 2 vacancies for the Expert / Specialist positions in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Expert / Specialist - Civil post?
faq.answer: For the Expert / Specialist - Civil post, candidates must possess a Bachelor of Engineering (B.E.) or Bachelor of Technology (B. Tech.) in Civil Engineering from a recognized university or institute.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Expert / Specialist positions at GSL?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Expert / Specialist positions is 65 years as of 30-04-2026. Specific age relaxation details are not provided.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for GSL Expert / Specialist recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. The application is free of cost.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these GSL posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Expert / Specialist posts at Goa Shipyard Limited will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q7. Is the application process online or offline?
faq.answer: The application process for the GSL Expert / Specialist recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary structure for the Expert / Specialist posts?
faq.answer: The salary for Ex-Govt. / PSU Employees will be their last drawn Basic + DA. For others, the salary will be decided by the Selection Committee.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of Goa Shipyard Limited, www.goashipyard.in. Links are provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Expert / Specialist at Goa Shipyard Limited are on a contract basis.
